servicesPage.intro: At Mike's Tires, we offer a full range of tire services to keep you safe on the road. From budget-friendly used tires to premium new ones, we have options for every driver in Dallas.

services.title: Used Tires
services.shortDescription: Affordable, inspected used tires that perform like new.
services.longDescription: Our used tires are carefully selected and inspected for safety. With tread depths starting at 6/32, you get reliable traction at a fraction of the cost. We stock all common sizes and many rare ones too.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We examine each tire for tread depth, sidewall damage, and age.

process.title: Selection
process.description: Choose from our extensive inventory of matching tires.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our techs mount, balance, and install your tires quickly.

faqs.question: How long do used tires last?
faqs.answer: Our used tires typically have 50-80% tread life remaining, lasting 20,000-40,000 miles depending on driving habits.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee used tires?
faqs.answer: Yes, all used tires come with a 30-day warranty against defects.

services.title: New Tires
services.shortDescription: Top brands at prices that beat the competition.
services.longDescription: We carry new tires from all major manufacturers including Michelin, Goodyear, Bridgestone, Continental, and more. Our pricing is transparent and competitive. We also offer free mounting and balancing with every purchase.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We help you choose the right tire for your vehicle and budget.

process.title: Ordering
process.description: We stock popular sizes; special orders arrive within 1-2 days.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Professional installation with torque checks and pressure settings.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer financing options through approved credit. Ask us for details.

faqs.question: What brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We carry Michelin, Goodyear, Bridgestone, Continental, Firestone, and many more.

services.title: Tire Repair & Rotation
services.shortDescription: Extend the life of your tires with professional maintenance.
services.longDescription: Regular tire rotations and timely repairs can extend tire life by thousands of miles. Our technicians inspect for wear patterns, check pressure, and repair punctures up to 1/4 inch in the tread area.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check tread depth, pressure, and look for damage.

process.title: Repair/Rotate
process.description: Punctures are patched from inside; tires are rotated according to manufacturer specs.

process.title: Final Check
process.description: We re-check pressure and torque lug nuts to spec.

faqs.question: Can all flat tires be repaired?
faqs.answer: Only punctures in the tread area that are less than 1/4 inch can be safely repaired. Sidewall damage requires replacement.

faqs.question: How often should I rotate my tires?
faqs.answer: Every 5,000 to 7,500 miles, or as recommended in your vehicle's owner manual.

services.title: Wheel Alignment
services.shortDescription: Keep your vehicle driving straight and true.
services.longDescription: Proper alignment prevents uneven tire wear and improves handling. We use state-of-the-art equipment to adjust camber, caster, and toe to manufacturer specifications.

process.title: Pre-Check
process.description: We inspect suspension components for wear.

process.title: Alignment
process.description: Computerized alignment adjusts all angles to spec.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We verify the steering wheel is centered and vehicle tracks straight.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need an alignment?
faqs.answer: Signs include uneven tire wear, vehicle pulling to one side, or a crooked steering wheel when driving straight.

faqs.question: How long does an alignment take?
faqs.answer: Typically 30-45 minutes depending on vehicle condition.

about.headline: About Mike's Tires
about.mission: To provide Dallas drivers with safe, affordable tires and exceptional service every time.
story: Mike's Tires was founded with a simple mission: offer quality tires at fair prices without the high-pressure sales tactics. What started as a small shop has grown into a trusted destination for drivers across Dallas. Our team brings decades of combined experience, and we treat every customer like a neighbor.

We believe in transparency, honesty, and hard work. From our used tire inspection process to our price match guarantee, every aspect of our business is designed to put you first. Whether you need a budget-friendly used tire or the latest Michelin, we've got you covered.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend services you don't need.

coreValues.title: Affordability
coreValues.description: Quality tires shouldn't break the bank. We offer competitive pricing.

coreValues.title: Speed
coreValues.description: We value your time. Most services are completed in under an hour.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: Every tire we sell meets strict safety standards.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Stop by or give us a call. We're here to help.
